name: Sequence Completion Recovery
description: Detects leads dropping below 85% sequence completion threshold. Auto-reassigns to senior closer, triggers Nemotron win-back script, logs intervention.

config.description: Calculate sequence health and determine recovery action
config.code: const totalTouches = 6; const completedTouches = parseInt(inputData.sequence_step); const connected = inputData.connected === 'true'; const completionRate = (completedTouches / totalTouches) * 100; const atRisk = completionRate < 85 && !connected; output = { at_risk: atRisk, completion_rate: completionRate.toFixed(1), completed_touches: completedTouches, total_touches: totalTouches, remaining: totalTouches - completedTouches, action: atRisk ? 'reassign_senior' : 'continue', lead_name: inputData.name, segment: inputData.segment, zone: inputData.zone };

payload.prompt: Generate a win-back call script for a lead that has not connected after {{step1.completed_touches}} of {{step1.total_touches}} attempts. Lead: {{step1.lead_name}}. Segment: {{step1.segment}}. Zone: {{step1.zone}}. This is a senior closer recovery call. Open with urgency and property risk. Reference previous outreach attempts without being aggressive. Close with complimentary first inspection offer.

config.message: SEQUENCE RECOVERY | {{step1.lead_name}} | {{step1.segment}} | {{step1.zone}} | {{step1.completion_rate}}% completion | Reassigned to senior closer with win-back script
